category.name: Sets & Suits
category.description: Complete outfit solutions for your little one - from casual wear to party wear sets.

products.name: OLLINGTON ST. Cotton Knit Half Sleeves Printed T-Shirt & Joggers Set - Multicolor & Grey
products.shortDescription: A comfortable and stylish t-shirt and joggers set for your little one.
products.description: Dress your little boy in style with this comfortable and trendy t-shirt and joggers set from OLLINGTON ST. Made from high-quality cotton knit fabric, this set features a printed t-shirt with half sleeves and matching joggers, perfect for casual wear or playdates.

products.name: Googo Gaaga Cotton Loop Knit Pack Of 2 Full Sleeves Checked & T Rex Text Dinosaur Patch Detailed Sweatshirts With Joggers Set - Cream
products.shortDescription: Pack of 2 winter-ready sweatshirt and joggers sets with dinosaur theme.
products.description: Keep your little one warm and stylish this winter with this pack of 2 sweatshirt and joggers sets from Googo Gaaga. Made from comfortable cotton loop knit fabric, these sets feature checked and T-Rex text designs with dinosaur patch detailing, perfect for the little dinosaur lover.

products.name: Googo Gaaga Cotton Single Jersey Knit Half Sleeves Rocket Printed Tee With Shorts Set - Blue
products.shortDescription: Rocket printed t-shirt and shorts set for your little astronaut.
products.description: Let your little one's imagination soar with this rocket-printed t-shirt and shorts set from Googo Gaaga. Made from comfortable cotton single jersey knit fabric, this set features a fun rocket print and is perfect for summer days.

products.name: Mark & Mia Cotton Knit Half Sleeves Oversized T-Shirt & Shorts Set With Pocket & Graphics Detailing - White & Blue
products.shortDescription: Trendy oversized t-shirt and shorts set with pocket detailing.

products.name: Mark & Mia Cotton Knit Half Sleeves Polo T-Shirt & Shorts With Tie Applique & Teddy Bear Embroidery - Multicolor
products.shortDescription: Adorable polo t-shirt and shorts set with tie applique and teddy bear embroidery.

products.name: Babyhug Cotton Woven Half Sleeves Shirts and Shorts Set With Abstract Print - Tan & Black
products.shortDescription: Stylish shirt and shorts set with abstract print for your little gentleman.

products.name: Babyhug Single Jersey Knit Half Sleeves Polo T-Shirt & Short with Suspender & Nautical Theme Print - White & Light Blue
products.shortDescription: Nautical-themed polo set with suspenders for a charming look.

products.name: Little Ninja Cotton Knit Half Sleeves Tie Dye Tee & Shorts Set - Blue
products.shortDescription: Cool tie-dye t-shirt and shorts set for a trendy look.

products.name: Googo Gaaga Cotton Woven Full Sleeves Striped Shirt With Jeans Set - Cream
products.shortDescription: Stylish striped shirt and jeans set for a smart casual look.

products.shortDescription: Elegant co-ords shirt and shorts set with floral print for special occasions.
